home.titleLine1: The Smart Platform for Blood Donation
home.subtitle: We connect donors and hospitals quickly and intelligently to ensure blood reaches those who need it in time.
home.step1Desc: Create a donor account and set your location.
home.step2Desc: Enter your health data safely and confidentially.
home.step3Desc: Get nearby requests matching your blood type.
home.step4Desc: A smart system matches donors with those in need.
home.step5Desc: Go to the assigned center to donate and save a life.

auth.heroSubtitle: We connect you with the right donor as fast as possible to save a life in need.
auth.agreeTerms: I agree to the Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy
auth.uploadLicense: Upload a Copy of the License
auth.uploadHint: Drag file here or choose a file
auth.donorSuccessTitle: Your account has been created successfully.
auth.donorSuccessBody: You can now log in and start using the Musaef platform.
auth.orgSuccessTitle: Your organization's registration request has been received.
auth.orgSuccessBody: Your information will be reviewed by the Musaef administration, and you'll be notified by email once approved or rejected.
auth.recoverSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a password reset link

help.title: Donation Guide & Medical Instructions
help.subtitle: A concise guide to understanding blood type compatibility, donation requirements, and essential medical guidance for a safe donation.
help.donateInfoTitle: Donation Compatibility (who can donate to whom?)
help.donateInfoBody: Shows who can donate to each blood type based on compatibility.
help.receiveInfoTitle: Reception Compatibility (who can receive from each type?)
help.receiveInfoBody: Shows who can safely receive blood from each blood type.
help.tip1Body: You can donate every 8 weeks (56 days) for men, and every 12 weeks (84 days) for women.
help.tip2Body: You must weigh at least 50kg to donate blood.
help.tip3Body: You must be between 18 and 65 years old to donate blood.
help.contactSubtitle: Contact us and we'll get back to you as soon as possible

footer.followDesc: We're present across your tools, and we care about your personal privacy.
footer.privacyDesc: We are committed to protecting your data and personal privacy
footer.termsDesc: Using the platform means you agree to the terms of use
footer.rights: All rights reserved to Musaef platform 2026
